_comment: Vtable slot order for constructible doc/view/frame/OLE classes, harvested via derived shims (phase1_harvest). Slots resolved to mfc140u @ordinal give the method ORDER; repeated symbols are ICF-folded trivial bodies (ambiguous, like the exception golden); harvest.exe+0x slots are inline CObject/CCmdTarget virtuals emitted locally (order valid, no exported identity). See harvested-layouts-batch2 memory.
